text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistaking it! I can feel a strong power
emanating from this spot!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Could it be the influence of you there, Three
Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What in the world? It's... so warm.
